name: HUMU Sandwich & Smoothies
tagline: Downtown sandwich shop with a 4.9 Google rating — the Reuben is the best on the island and locals want to keep it secret.
mustOrder: Reuben sandwich — consistently called the best on Oahu
smoothies — surprisingly good for a sandwich shop
parking: Merchant St metered parking; downtown parking garages
talkStory: A tiny deli on Merchant Street in Honolulu's financial district with a near-perfect 4.9 Google rating — one of the highest-rated food spots on Oahu. Owner Humu crafts each sandwich by hand, and the Reuben (proper corned beef, sauerkraut, Russian dressing, rye) is consistently called the best on the island. The bulgogi sub is a Korean-meets-deli crossover that shouldn't work but absolutely does. Weekday lunch hours only, primarily feeding downtown office workers who guard this spot like a secret.
